# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

$templatesDir = __DIR__ . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'templates';
$defaultPage  = 'home';

$page = $_GET['page'] ?? $defaultPage;
if (!is_string($page)) $page = $defaultPage;

$page = trim($page);
$page = ($page === '') ? $defaultPage : $page;

$page = str_replace(['\\', '/'], '', $page);
$page = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/', '', $page) ?: $defaultPage;

$templateFile = $templatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $page . '.php';

if (!is_dir($templatesDir)) {
	http_response_code(500);
	echo 'Templates directory not found.';
	exit;
}

if (!is_file($templateFile) || !is_readable($templateFile)) {
	http_response_code(404);
	$notFound = $templatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . '404.php';
	if (is_file($notFound) && is_readable($notFound)) {
		require $notFound;
	} else {
		echo 'Page not found.';
	}
	exit;
}

require $templateFile;
